summary: Comprehensive testing of MedEquipMart medical equipment e-commerce platform completed. All 31 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing shows all major features working correctly including homepage, admin panel, bulk order form, products catalog, cart, and user dashboard.

issues: Some product images show placeholder/broken images (e.g., Digital Thermometer shows broccoli image)

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, categories with Lottie animations, featured products (8 products)
5 category cards displayed with animated icons
Admin login with admin@medequipmart.com / admin123 - SUCCESS
Admin Panel loads with stats cards (Products: 17, Orders: 0, Bulk Enquiries: 4, Pending Verifications: 1)
Admin Panel - Add Product functionality works (tested creating and deleting product)
Admin Panel - View existing products and delete functionality works
Admin Panel - View bulk enquiries tab shows 4 enquiries with status management
Bulk Order page - submit bulk enquiry form works (redirects to dashboard with success toast)
User login with hospital@example.com / demo123 - SUCCESS
User Dashboard - view orders and bulk enquiries works
WhatsApp button visible and functional (opens WhatsApp with pre-filled message)
Product catalog page with category filtering works (17 products, filters correctly)
All 31 backend API tests passed including auth, products, cart, bulk enquiries, reviews, admin endpoints
critical_code_review_comments: Razorpay payment integration uses MOCKED placeholder keys (rzp_test_1234567890) - will fail actual payments
Some product images are placeholder/incorrect (e.g., Digital Thermometer shows broccoli image)
seed_data_creation: Test bulk enquiries created during testing (TEST_Automated_Hospital, TEST_Hospital_Enquiry, TEST_StatusUpdate_Clinic)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working. Backend API tests in /app/backend/tests/test_medequipmart_api.py cover auth, products, cart, bulk enquiries, reviews, and admin endpoints. Razorpay payment is MOCKED with test keys. WhatsApp integration uses +919045660485.

mocked_integrations.razorpay: Uses placeholder test keys (rzp_test_1234567890) - actual payments will fail
